ai_summary: Arkade Developers Limited has disclosed a tax demand of ₹1,373,857 from GST authorities for alleged improper Input Tax Credit availment and GST on Transferable Development Rights for FY 2022-23. The company states there is no material impact on its financial or operational activities and is considering filing an appeal. While the monetary impact is declared non-material, this highlights a potential minor area of tax compliance dispute or differing interpretation within the real estate sector.
